headline: Iran Conflict Sends Oil Prices Higher. 2 Chemical Stocks to Keep an Eye On.
summary: Dow Inc. and LyondellBasell Industries could benefit from widening oil and natural-gas spreads as Iran-related turmoil lifts crude prices.
